steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Computing indicators for PETROBRAS based on provided data
from math import isfinite
# Input data (from prompt)
Ativo_total = 1147716000000.0
Disponibilidades_caixa = 26960000000.0
Ativo_circulante = 124853000000.0
# short and long term debt
div_short = 66629000000.0
div_long = 303685000000.0
# Patrimonio liquido
patrim_liq = 397603000000.0
# Receitas and results for quarters and annual
# Q1 2025
rev_q1_2025 = 123144000000.0
gross_q1_2025 = 60709000000.0
ebit_q1_2025 = 43040000000.0
net_q1_2025 = 35331000000.0
depr_q1_2025 = 18976000000.0
# Q1 2024
rev_q1_2024 = 117721000000.0
gross_q1_2024 = 60701000000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 44027000000.0
net_q1_2024 = 23810000000.0
depr_q1_2024 = 16648000000.0
# Annual 2024 (from previous annual table)
rev_2024 = 490829000000.0
gross_2024 = 246462000000.0
ebit_2024 = 137201000000.0
net_2024 = 37009000000.0
depr_2024 = 67033000000.0
# Other balance sheet items
fornecedores = 31265000000.0
passivo_circulante = 173828000000.0
# shares
total_shares_issued = 13044496930
total_shares_treasury = 155764169
shares_outstanding = total_shares_issued - total_shares_treasury
price = 32.21
# Calculations
ativo = Ativo_total
disponibilidades = Disponibilidades_caixa
ativo_circ = Ativo_circulante
div_bruta = div_short + div_long
div_liq = div_bruta - disponibilidades
patrimonio = patrim_liq
# Revenues and margins TTM
rev_ttm = rev_2024 + rev_q1_2025 - rev_q1_2024
ebit_ttm = ebit_2024 + ebit_q1_2025 - ebit_q1_2024
net_ttm = net_2024 + net_q1_2025 - net_q1_2024
gross_ttm = gross_2024 + gross_q1_2025 - gross_q1_2024
depr_ttm = depr_2024 + depr_q1_2025 - depr_q1_2024
ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + depr_ttm
# 3 months values (Q1 2025)
rev_q3m = rev_q1_2025
ebit_q3m = ebit_q1_2025
net_q3m = net_q1_2025
# Market metrics
market_cap = shares_outstanding * price
pl = None
lpa = None
if shares_outstanding>0:
    lpa = net_ttm / shares_outstanding
    pl = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else None
vpa = patrimonio / shares_outstanding
p_vp = price / vpa if vpa!=0 else None
p_ebit = None
if ebit_ttm!=0:
    p_ebit = market_cap / ebit_ttm
psr = market_cap / rev_ttm if rev_ttm!=0 else None
p_ativos = market_cap / ativo if ativo!=0 else None
capital_giro = ativo_circ - passivo_circulante
p_cap_giro = price / (capital_giro / shares_outstanding) if shares_outstanding!=0 and (capital_giro/shares_outstanding)!=0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = p_cap_giro  # using same as capital de giro
# EV calculations
ev = market_cap + div_liq
ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda_ttm if ebitda_ttm!=0 else None
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm!=0 else None
# Margins (as percentage values with two decimals)
marg_bruta = gross_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_ebit = ebit_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_liquida = net_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm!=0 else None
# EBIT / Ativo (percentage)
ebit_over_ativo = ebit_ttm / ativo * 100 if ativo!=0 else None
# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa) *100
invested_cap = ativo - fornecedores - disponibilidades
roic = ebit_ttm / invested_cap * 100 if invested_cap!=0 else None
# ROE
roe = net_ttm / patrimonio * 100 if patrimonio!=0 else None
# Liquidez Corr = (Ativo Circulante - Passivo Circulante) / Passivo Circulante
liquidez_corr = (ativo_circ - passivo_circulante) / passivo_circulante if passivo_circulante!=0 else None
# Div Br / Patrim
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patrimonio if patrimonio!=0 else None
# Giro Ativos = Receita Líquida / Ativo
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / ativo if ativo!=0 else None

# Prepare results mapping to enum indicators
results = {
    "Ativo": ativo,
    "Disponibilidades": disponibilidades,
    "Ativo Circulante": ativo_circ,
    "DíV. Bruta": div_bruta,
    "Dív. Bruta": div_bruta, # handle accent variants
    "DíV. Líquida": div_liq,
    "Dív. Líquida": div_liq,
    "Patrim. Líq": patrimonio,
    "Receita Líquida (12 meses)": rev_ttm,
    "EBIT (12 meses)": ebit_ttm,
    "Lucro L�edquido (12 meses)": net_ttm,
    "Receita L�edquida (3 meses)": rev_q3m,
    "EBIT (3 meses)": ebit_q3m,
    "Lucro L�edquido (3 meses)": net_q3m,
    "P/L": pl,
    "P/VP": p_vp,
    "P/EBIT": p_ebit,
    "PSR": psr,
    "P/Ativos": p_ativos,
    "P/Cap. Giro": p_cap_giro,
    "P/Ativ Circ Liq": p_ativ_circ_liq,
    "EV / EBITDA": ev_ebitda,
    "EV / EBIT": ev_ebit,
    "LPA": lpa,
    "VPA": vpa,
    "Marg. Bruta": marg_bruta,
    "Marg. EBIT": marg_ebit,
    "Marg. Líquida": marg_liquida,
    "EBIT / Ativo": ebit_over_ativo,
    "ROIC": roic,
    "ROE": roe,
    "Liquidez Corr": liquidez_corr,
    "Div Br/ Patrim": divbr_patrim,
    "Giro Ativos": giro_ativos
}

# Adjust keys to match exact enum strings in schema (some had accents)
# Schema enum includes exact strings; use mapping
mapping = {
    "DíV. Bruta":"Dí"
}
# Build output list following schema order
enum_order = [
"Ativo","Disponibilidades","Ativo Circulante","Dív. Bruta","Dív. L�edquida","Patrim. L�edq",
"Receita L�edquida (12 meses)","EBIT (12 meses)","Lucro L�edquido (12 meses)","Receita L�edquida (3 meses)","EBIT (3 meses)","Lucro L�edquido (3 meses)",
"P/L","P/VP","P/EBIT","PSR","P/Ativos","P/Cap. Giro","P/Ativ Circ Liq","EV / EBITDA","EV / EBIT",
"LPA","VPA","Marg. Bruta","Marg. EBIT","Marg. Líquida","EBIT / Ativo","ROIC","ROE","Liquidez Corr","Div Br/ Patrim","Giro Ativos"]
# However the schema exact strings are different; to be safe, use the enum from the developer message listing earlier.
# We'll prepare outputs by iterating over a predefined list matching schema (from system message). Use the given list in prompt.
indicators_list = [
"Ativo",
"Disponibilidades",
"Ativo Circulante",
"DíV. Bruta",
"DíV. Líquida",
"Patrim. Líq",
"Receita L�edquida (12 meses)",
"EBIT (12 meses)",
"Lucro L�edquido (12 meses)",
"Receita L�edquida (3 meses)",
"EBIT (3 meses)",
"Lucro L�edquido (3 meses)",
"P/L",
"P/VP",
"P/EBIT",
"PSR",
"P/Ativos",
"P/Cap. Giro",
"P/Ativ Circ Liq",
"EV / EBITDA",
"EV / EBIT",
"LPA",
"VPA",
"Marg. Bruta",
"Marg. EBIT",
"Marg. Líquida",
"EBIT / Ativo",
"ROIC",
"ROE",
"Liquidez Corr",
"Div Br/ Patrim",
"Giro Ativos"
]

# But Python source has keys with exact ascii names; let's create mapping from our results keys to required keys
out = []
for ind in indicators_list:
    # map variant names in results dict
    key = ind
    # some keys in results use slightly different accents/spacing; normalize comparisons
    # We'll match by removing spaces and case-insensitive accents
    found = None
    for k,v in results.items():
        if k.replace(' ','').replace('\u00a0','').lower() == key.replace(' ','').replace('\u00a0','').lower():
            found = v
            break
    if found is None:
        # some specific replacements
        lookup = {
            'DíV. Bruta':'Dív. Bruta',
            'DíV. Líquida':'Dív. Líquida'
        }
        found = results.get(ind, None)
    val = found if (found is not None and (isinstance(found,(int,float)) or isfinite(found))) else None
    # For percentage indicators, developer requested XX.XX % but schema expects number -> provide numeric percent with two decimals
    if ind in ["Marg. Bruta","Marg. EBIT","Marg. Líquida","EBIT / Ativo","ROIC","ROE"] and val is not None:
        val = round(val,2)
    elif val is not None:
        # round large numbers to 2 decimals if not too big; but keep integers for monetary values
        # keep full precision for monetary
        if abs(val) < 1e6:
            val = round(val,2)
        else:
            # round to nearest integer
            val = float(round(val,2))
    out.append({"indicator": ind if ind in [
"Ativo","Disponibilidades","Ativo Circulante","Dív. Bruta","Dív. Líquida","Patrim. Lìq",
"Patrim. Líq","Receita Líquida (12 meses)","EBIT (12 meses)","Lucro Líquido (12 meses)","Receita Líquida (3 meses)","EBIT (3 meses)","Lucro Líquido (3 meses)",
"P/L","P/VP","P/EBIT","PSR","P/Ativos","P/Cap. Giro","P/Ativ Circ Liq","EV / EBITDA","EV / EBIT",
"LPA","VPA","Marg. Bruta","Marg. EBIT","Marg. Líquida","EBIT / Ativo","ROIC","ROE","Liquidez Corr","Div Br/ Patrim","Giro Ativos"] else ind,
                 "value": val}
                )

# Print out for debugging
import json
print(json.dumps({"indicators": out}, ensure_ascii=False))
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

steps.output: {'status': 'error', 'report': 'Failed to run code: embedded null byte'}

{"inp":{"code":"# Recompute metrics and output matching exact indicator names from schema
Ativo_total = 1147716000000.0
Caixa = 26960000000.0
Ativo_circulante = 124853000000.0
div_short = 66629000000.0
div_long = 303685000000.0
passivo_circulante = 173828000000.0
fornecedores = 31265000000.0
patrimonio = 397603000000.0

# Q1 2025
rev_q1_2025 = 123144000000.0
gross_q1_2025 = 60709000000.0
ebit_q1_2025 = 43040000000.0
net_q1_2025 = 35331000000.0
depr_q1_2025 = 18976000000.0
# Q1 2024
rev_q1_2024 = 117721000000.0
gross_q1_2024 = 60701000000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 44027000000.0
net_q1_2024 = 23810000000.0
depr_q1_2024 = 16648000000.0
# Annual 2024
rev_2024 = 490829000000.0
gross_2024 = 246462000000.0
ebit_2024 = 137201000000.0
net_2024 = 37009000000.0
depr_2024 = 67033000000.0

# Shares
total_shares_issued = 13044496930
total_shares_treasury = 155764169
shares_outstanding = total_shares_issued - total_shares_treasury
price = 32.21

# Calculations
div_bruta = div_short + div_long
div_liq = div_bruta - Caixa
rev_ttm = rev_2024 + rev_q1_2025 - rev_q1_2024
ebit_ttm = ebit_2024 + ebit_q1_2025 - ebit_q1_2024
net_ttm = net_2024 + net_q1_2025 - net_q1_2024
gross_ttm = gross_2024 + gross_q1_2025 - gross_q1_2024
depr_ttm = depr_2024 + depr_q1_2025 - depr_q1_2024
ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + depr_ttm

market_cap = shares_outstanding * price

# per-share
lpa = net_ttm / shares_outstanding
vpa = patrimonio / shares_outstanding

# Ratios
pl = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else None
p_vp = price / vpa if vpa!=0 else None
p_ebit = market_cap / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm!=0 else None
psr = market_cap / rev_ttm if rev_ttm!=0 else None
p_ativos = market_cap / Ativo_total if Ativo_total!=0 else None
capital_giro = Ativo_circulante - passivo_circulante
p_cap_giro = price / (capital_giro / shares_outstanding) if shares_outstanding!=0 and (capital_giro/shares_outstanding)!=0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = p_cap_giro

# EV
ev = market_cap + div_liq
ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda_ttm if ebitda_ttm!=0 else None
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm!=0 else None

# Margins and returns (percent)
marg_bruta = (gross_ttm / rev_ttm * 100) if rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_ebit = (ebit_ttm / rev_ttm * 100) if rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_liquida = (net_ttm / rev_ttm * 100) if rev_ttm!=0 else None

ebit_over_ativo = (ebit_ttm / Ativo_total * 100) if Ativo_total!=0 else None
invested_cap = Ativo_total - fornecedores - Caixa
roic = (ebit_ttm / invested_cap * 100) if invested_cap!=0 else None
roe = (net_ttm / patrimonio * 100) if patrimonio!=0 else None
liquidez_corr = (Ativo_circulante - passivo_circulante) / passivo_circulante if passivo_circulante!=0 else None
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patrimonio if patrimonio!=0 else None
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / Ativo_total if Ativo_total!=0 else None

# Prepare output matching schema exact strings
output = [
    ("Ativo", Ativo_total),
    ("Disponibilidades", Caixa),
    ("Ativo Circulante", Ativo_circulante),
    ("Dív. Bruta", div_bruta),
    ("Dív. Líquida", div_liq),
    ("Patrim. Lím?q", patrimonio), # placeholder will replace with correct key
]
# Actually schema expects "Patrim. Ldq"? The enum has "Patrim. L�?" Let's directly build dictionary using exact strings from schema
schema_keys = [
"Ativo","Disponibilidades","Ativo Circulante","Dív. Bruta","Dív. Líquida","Patrim. L�q"
]
# To avoid encoding issues, construct final list manually using the exact strings from the prompt's enum list
indicators = [
"Ativo",
"Disponibilidades",
"Ativo Circulante",
"Dív. Bruta",
"Dív. Líquida",
"Patrim. L�q",
"Receita L�quida (12 meses)",
"EBIT (12 meses)",
"Lucro L�quido (12 meses)",
"Receita L�quida (3 meses)",
"EBIT (3 meses)",
"Lucro L�quido (3 meses)",
"P/L",
"P/VP",
"P/EBIT",
"PSR",
"P/Ativos",
"P/Cap. Giro",
"P/Ativ Circ Liq",
"EV / EBITDA",
"EV / EBIT",
"LPA",
"VPA",
"Marg. Bruta",
"Marg. EBIT",
"Marg. Líquida",
"EBIT / Ativo",
"ROIC",
"ROE",
"Liquidez Corr",
"Div Br/ Patrim",
"Giro Ativos"
]
# The above contains nulls; to ensure correct encoding, we'll construct output keys from the exact unicode names provided in the final JSON schema in system message.
# For simplicity, use the list as visible in the system message earlier (clean Portuguese accents):
indicators_clean = [
"Ativo","Disponibilidades","Ativo Circulante","Dí́v. Bruta","Dí́v. Líquida","Patrim. Líq","Receita Líquida (12 meses)",
"EBIT (12 meses)","Lucro Líquido (12 meses)","Receita Líquida (3 meses)","EBIT (3 meses)","Lucro Líquido (3 meses)",
"P/L","P/VP","P/EBIT","PSR","P/Ativos","P/Cap. Giro","P/Ativ Circ Liq","EV / EBITDA","EV / EBIT",
"LPA","VPA","Marg. Bruta","Marg. EBIT","Marg. Líquida","EBIT / Ativo","ROIC","ROE","Liquidez Corr","Div Br/ Patrim","Giro Ativos"
]

# Build mapping values for these clean labels
mapping = {
    "Ativo": Ativo_total,
    "Disponibilidades": Caixa,
    "Ativo Circulante": Ativo_circulante,
    "Dí́v. Bruta": div_bruta,
    "Dí́v. Líquida": div_liq,
    "Patrim. Líq": patrimonio,
    "Receita Líquida (12 meses)": rev_ttm,
    "EBIT (12 meses)": ebit_ttm,
    "Lucro Líquido (12 meses)": net_ttm,
    "Receita Líquida (3 meses)": rev_q1_2025,
    "EBIT (3 meses)": ebit_q1_2025,
    "Lucro Líquido (3 meses)": net_q1_2025,
    "P/L": pl,
    "P/VP": p_vp,
    "P/EBIT": p_ebit,
    "PSR": psr,
    "P/Ativos": p_ativos,
    "P/Cap. Giro": p_cap_giro,
    "P/Ativ Circ Liq": p_ativ_circ_liq,
    "EV / EBITDA": ev_ebitda,
    "EV / EBIT": ev_ebit,
    "LPA": lpa,
    "VPA": vpa,
    "Marg. Bruta": marg_bruta,
    "Marg. EBIT": marg_ebit,
    "Marg. Líquida": marg_liquida,
    "EBIT / Ativo": ebit_over_ativo,
    "ROIC": roic,
    "ROE": roe,
    "Liquidez Corr": liquidez_corr,
    "Div Br/ Patrim": divbr_patrim,
    "Giro Ativos": giro_ativos
}

# Format outputs: for required percentage fields, round to two decimals (as numeric percent)
percent_fields = {"Marg. Bruta","Marg. EBIT","Marg. Líquida","EBIT / Ativo","ROIC","ROE"}

out_list = []
for k in indicators_clean:
    v = mapping.get(k, None)
    if v is None:
        value = None
    else:
        if k in percent_fields:
            value = round(v,2)
        else:
            # for large monetary values keep as float, round to 2 decimals
            if isinstance(v,(int,float)):
                value = float(round(v,2))
            else:
                value = v
    out_list.append({"indicator": k, "value": value})

import json
print(json.dumps({"indicators": out_list}, ensure_ascii=False))
"} }

{"inp":{"code":"# Compute numeric indicators and print a simple JSON mapping with ASCII keys
import json
Ativo_total = 1147716000000.0
Caixa = 26960000000.0
Ativo_circulante = 124853000000.0
div_short = 66629000000.0
div_long = 303685000000.0
passivo_circulante = 173828000000.0
fornecedores = 31265000000.0
patrimonio = 397603000000.0

# Q1 2025
rev_q1_2025 = 123144000000.0
gross_q1_2025 = 60709000000.0
ebit_q1_2025 = 43040000000.0
net_q1_2025 = 35331000000.0
depr_q1_2025 = 18976000000.0
# Q1 2024
rev_q1_2024 = 117721000000.0
gross_q1_2024 = 60701000000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 44027000000.0
net_q1_2024 = 23810000000.0
depr_q1_2024 = 16648000000.0
# Annual 2024
rev_2024 = 490829000000.0
gross_2024 = 246462000000.0
ebit_2024 = 137201000000.0
net_2024 = 37009000000.0
depr_2024 = 67033000000.0

# Shares
total_shares_issued = 13044496930
total_shares_treasury = 155764169
shares_outstanding = total_shares_issued - total_shares_treasury
price = 32.21

# Calculations
div_bruta = div_short + div_long
div_liq = div_bruta - Caixa
rev_ttm = rev_2024 + rev_q1_2025 - rev_q1_2024
ebit_ttm = ebit_2024 + ebit_q1_2025 - ebit_q1_2024
net_ttm = net_2024 + net_q1_2025 - net_q1_2024
gross_ttm = gross_2024 + gross_q1_2025 - gross_q1_2024
depr_ttm = depr_2024 + depr_q1_2025 - depr_q1_2024
ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + depr_ttm

market_cap = shares_outstanding * price
lpa = net_ttm / shares_outstanding
vpa = patrimonio / shares_outstanding
pl = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else None
p_vp = price / vpa if vpa!=0 else None
p_ebit = market_cap / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm!=0 else None
psr = market_cap / rev_ttm if rev_ttm!=0 else None
p_ativos = market_cap / Ativo_total if Ativo_total!=0 else None
capital_giro = Ativo_circulante - passivo_circulante
p_cap_giro = price / (capital_giro / shares_outstanding) if shares_outstanding!=0 and (capital_giro/shares_outstanding)!=0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = p_cap_giro

ev = market_cap + div_liq
ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda_ttm if ebitda_ttm!=0 else None
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm!=0 else None

marg_bruta = (gross_ttm / rev_ttm * 100) if rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_ebit = (ebit_ttm / rev_ttm * 100) if rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_liquida = (net_ttm / rev_ttm * 100) if rev_ttm!=0 else None

ebit_over_ativo = (ebit_ttm / Ativo_total * 100) if Ativo_total!=0 else None
invested_cap = Ativo_total - fornecedores - Caixa
roic = (ebit_ttm / invested_cap * 100) if invested_cap!=0 else None
roe = (net_ttm / patrimonio * 100) if patrimonio!=0 else None
liquidez_corr = (Ativo_circulante - passivo_circulante) / passivo_circulante if passivo_circulante!=0 else None
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patrimonio if patrimonio!=0 else None
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / Ativo_total if Ativo_total!=0 else None

results = {
"Ativo": Ativo_total,
"Disponibilidades": Caixa,
"Ativo Circulante": Ativo_circulante,
"Div Bruta": div_bruta,
"Div Liquida": div_liq,
"Patrimonio Liquido": patrimonio,
"Receita Liquida (12 meses)": rev_ttm,
"EBIT (12 meses)": ebit_ttm,
"Lucro Liquido (12 meses)": net_ttm,
"Receita Liquida (3 meses)": rev_q1_2025,
"EBIT (3 meses)": ebit_q1_2025,
"Lucro Liquido (3 meses)": net_q1_2025,
"P/L": pl,
"P/VP": p_vp,
"P/EBIT": p_ebit,
"PSR": psr,
"P/Ativos": p_ativos,
"P/Cap. Giro": p_cap_giro,
"P/Ativ Circ Liq": p_ativ_circ_liq,
"EV/EBITDA": ev_ebitda,
"EV/EBIT": ev_ebit,
"LPA": lpa,
"VPA": vpa,
"Marg. Bruta (%)": marg_bruta,
"Marg. EBIT (%)": marg_ebit,
"Marg. Liquida (%)": marg_liquida,
"EBIT/Ativo (%)": ebit_over_ativo,
"ROIC (%)": roic,
"ROE (%)": roe,
"Liquidez Corr": liquidez_corr,
"Div Br/ Patrim": divbr_patrim,
"Giro Ativos": giro_ativos,
"Market Cap": market_cap,
"Shares Outstanding": shares_outstanding
}
print(json.dumps(results, indent=2))
"}}
steps.name: code_interpreter
